name: agentglass
description: Real-time observability dashboard for Claude Code multi-agent workflows — cost, tokens, tool latency, error rates, and session timelines.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('agentglass: run [bun run setup] to wire Claude Code hooks, [bun run connect] for OTel CLIs')"
